action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline iCaRL (50 exemplars, 15 epochs/task) gave avg accuracy 0.2567, with task_0=0.293 and task_9=0.685. Analysis: Replay helps but forgetting remains; increasing replay buffer, adding data augmentation, and using longer training with cosine LR can improve. Decision: rewrite train.py with 200 exemplars/class, augmentation, 20 epochs/task, and cosine schedule; submit eval to measure gain.
